Episodes.Title: The Yanks in the U.K.: Parts 1 and 2
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Karine Rosenthal
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: During Bones' stay in England, the daughter of an American businessman is murdered. The businessman insists that the FBI help with the case, so Booth and Bones investigate. Meanwhile, Angela's husband shows up at the Jeffersonian.

Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Carla Kettner
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: A body is discovered in an outhouse. The victim is a host of show that exposes men's infidelities. Booth learns about Bones's dating situation.

Episodes.Title: The Finger in the Nest
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Lyla Oliver
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: While spending some time with his son, Booth finds a human finger. They find the body of a veterinarian. Hodgins starts to realize how he's been affected by the turmoil in his life.

Episodes.Title: The Perfect Pieces in the Purple Pond
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Josh Berman
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: The dissected body of an author with OCD is discovered by a pair of teenagers and leads the team on a search for the head and the killer. Also, Sweets and Hodgins visit Zack in the mental institution.

Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Part of a leg drops into an elevator. The gruesome discovery finds the body had been in the shaft for a few days. The victim was an office manager who was disliked by everyone. As the team investigates, Angela and Hodgins come to ...

Episodes.Title: The He in the She
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Karina Csolty
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Half a decomposed body is discovered by a pair of beach combers. They find the deceased was leader of a local religious congregation. When the other half of the body is found, they learn the leader had a hidden past.

Episodes.Title: The Skull in the Sculpture
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Janet Lin
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: A skull is found in a crushed car. The investigation leads to an artist who used crushed vehicles in his artwork, leaving the team to wonder if he made himself part of his art.

Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Karine Rosenthal
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: A body flies out of an exploding meth lab. As the team tries to identify the body, Booth works on a big case which could boost his career, but he's distracted when his brother shows up and shows some interest in Bones.

Episodes.Title: The Passenger in the Oven
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Carla Kettner
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Bones and Booth fly to China so Brennan can identify some remains. During the flight, a body is discovered inside an oven. Bones and Booth must solve the crime before the flight lands in China.

Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Carla Kettner
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Brennan and Booth investigate the remains of a bodyguard of two children who attend a high security school for the children of important people. Also, Cam hires Brennan's father as a teacher which causes some conflicts for Bones.

Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Lyla Oliver
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: The remains of a set of conjoined twins are found on an oil field. When they find out the twins worked at a circus, Bones and Booth go undercover to find the culprit.

Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: The body of a victim is found in a frozen lake. Booth identifies the body as a rival hockey player, making Booth a suspect in the crime. Now the Squints have to work with a new agent to solve the crime.

Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: The Gravedigger returns and captures Booth. He wants the evidence that someone has stolen from the case, and he believes that Bones has it. Can the Squints find their friend before Booth becomes the Gravediggers latest casualty?

Episodes.Plot: The remains of a volleyball player are found in a Salt Truck. They discover that she was pregnant, and that several of her friends are also pregnant.
